HGSS.664.0001:
You know, I’m going to practice a whole
bunch so we can battle again the next\r
time we meet.\f
That’s right! Give me your phone
number so I can call you! [0200,0000]
HGSS.664.0004:
Hey! You really want to trade phone
numbers with me, don’t you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.664.0005:
Huh?
I can hear the sound of a windmill...\f
That must mean that you’re nearby,
aren’t you?\f
So come have a proper conversation!
HGSS.664.0006:
My [0100,000A,0000] works really hard!\f
Everything I learn at school, it helps
me repeat it right away.\f
Do your Pokémon listen to what you say?
HGSS.664.0007:
Yesterday we battled a [0100,000B,0000]!\f
We practiced all the stuff I learned
in school!\f
Where do you go to school?
Seriously, you don’t go to my school?\r
That can’t be true, can it?
HGSS.664.0008:
Recently I was trying to catch a
[0100,000B,0000], but it ran away!\r
So disappointing!\f
And so I don’t forget how disappointing
it was, I’m writing down the name of the\r
Pokémon that got away on my notebook.\f
There’re Pokémon names all over
my notebook!
HGSS.664.0009:
Hey, come battle me again.
I’ll be waiting at [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.664.0010:
Hello? I’m at [0104,0003,0000]. We
were going to battle, weren’t we?\r
Hurry on over!
HGSS.664.0011:
Huh? The only time you ever see me is
when I’m on my way home from school?\f
I suppose you’re right...\f
But when I’m on my way to school, I’m
always in a rush so that I’m not late.\f
I don’t have any time for Pokémon
battles then!
